gapped_text:
What particularly impresses Judith about many forms of _______ communication is the degree of ingenuity shown by the people who devised them. Ancient civilisations were not ignorant of the fact that an effective communication network was a fundamental part of _______ a vast empire.
The Roman _______ _______ was the most advanced of its time.
The Romans relied upon a _______ of messengers for speed of delivery.
A boom in international trade in the Middle Ages brought about an increase in _______ _______ leading to a reformation of existing postal services.
These reforms were later improved upon as a result of the invention of the _______ _______ .
The failure of the Pony Express was attributed to the invention of the _______ .
The fact that pigeons are well-suited for _______ was well-known by the ancient Egyptians.
More recently, carrier pigeons proved themselves to be invaluable as _______ _______ .

Antibiotics are ineffective against _______ infections.
Infections are triggered by two kinds of _______ .
Antibiotics are only useful when it comes to fighting _______ bacteria.
When bacteria _______ _______ to antibiotics they become resistant.
Unnecessary use of antibiotics renders one vulnerable to _______ _______ .
Infections caused by bacteria are extremely _______ .
According to the World Health Organisation, proper use of antibiotics results in the maximum clinical _______ _______ .
For doctors, getting the dosage and duration of an antibiotic prescription right is quite a _______ _______ .
Some foods interfere with the _______ of antibiotics in the stomach.

Robert Lee runs an organisation that specialises in the _______ of professionals.
Robert is certain that it will not be possible to succeed in the e-economy without possessing _______ _______ .
According to Robert, more people will use the Internet to work _______ as companies grow smaller.
Employers of e-lancers benefit from the talent auction because it gives them a(n) _______ _______ of candidates.
Robert says that those people who want to and are able to _______ will be most in demand in the future.
Research has shown that increased _______ can ensure better learning choices.
According to Robert, it is not the subject, but the actual _______ of learning that is important.
As a result of changes in the working environment, managers will need to _______ .
Nowadays, the amount of time employees spend on their work is less important than their _______ .

The Internet community showed great _______ _______ when asked to help the earthquake victims.
Financial transactions which are _______ _______ can go wrong because of network failures.
The fishermen used a morse radio to send out a _______ _______ .
Research showed that people value the _______ _______ speech provides.
